subject: Refund request for headphones
body: Hi, I bought a pair of headphones last month but they stopped working after a week. Order number is ORD-1001. I'd like a full refund please.

subject: I want to return my watch
body: Hello, I received my smart watch on March 4th (order ORD-1002) but I don't like it. Can I return it for a refund?

subject: Coffee maker stopped working
body: My BrewMaster coffee maker (ORD-1003) stopped heating water about 2 weeks ago. It's clearly a defect. I want a replacement or refund.

subject: Wrong size delivered
body: I ordered size 10 running shoes (ORD-1004) and received size 9. This is unacceptable. I need the correct size or a full refund.

subject: Return request
body: Hi team, I'd like to return the two bluetooth speakers I ordered back in December (ORD-1005). I know it might be past the return window but I've been traveling. Can you help?

subject: I want to cancel
body: Hey, I want to cancel my recent yoga mat order ORD-1006. Can you do that before it ships?

subject: Laptop stand return
body: I want to return my laptop stand (ORD-1007). It wobbles too much and isn't stable. I ordered it about 6 weeks ago.

subject: Lamp came broken
body: The desk lamp I ordered arrived with a cracked base. The box also looked damaged. I have photos if needed. Order ORD-1008.

subject: Refund already done?
body: Hi I submitted a refund for my headphones (ORD-1009) a few days ago. Can you confirm it went through?

subject: Where is my order?
body: I ordered a coffee maker over 3 days ago and haven't received it. What is going on? Order ORD-1010.

subject: Shoes warranty
body: My running shoes ORD-1011 are peeling at the sole after two weeks. I want a warranty replacement or refund.

subject: Watch battery drains fast
body: PulseX watch from order ORD-1012 dies in under 12 hours. Please advise on repair or return.

subject: Headphones pairing issue
body: ProSound headphones ORD-1013 will not pair with my laptop. I've tried resetting. Need help or refund.

subject: Speaker volume crackling
body: BoomBox speaker ORD-1014 crackles at medium volume. I'd like a replacement.

subject: Stand not shipped yet
body: I ordered laptop stand ORD-1015 last week. Tracking shows stuck in transit. When will it arrive?

subject: Coffee maker refund
body: BrewMaster ORD-1016 arrived with a dented water tank. I want a full refund.

subject: Lamp flicker
body: LumiDesk lamp ORD-1017 flickers constantly. Unsafe — please refund.

subject: Yoga mat smell
body: ZenFlow mat ORD-1018 has a strong chemical smell. Can I return it?

subject: VIP wrong item
body: As a VIP I expected better — order ORD-1019 shows delivered but I received the wrong color shoes.

subject: Headphones case missing
body: Order ORD-1020 headphones arrived without the charging case listed on the site. Send the case or refund partial amount.
